items: Kyle Schwarber homered 3 times, driving in 6 as Philadelphia beat The Mets, 15-3.
Travis Bazzana homered 2 times, driving in 5 as Cleveland beat Houston, 8-1.
Ozzie Albies homered 2 times, driving in 3 as Atlanta beat Milwaukee, 4-3.
Bryce Harper hit for the cycle in Philadelphia's 15-3 win.
Joey Cantillo held down Houston for 8.0 innings, striking out 9 in Cleveland's 8-1 win.
Sal Stewart had 6 RBI as Cincinnati beat The Yankees, 10-2.
Manny Machado had 5 RBI, with 1 home run as San Diego beat Texas, 6-4.
The Angels pitching combined to shut out The Athletics, 7-0.
San Diego edged Texas, 6-4, in 10 innings.
Colorado walked off Pittsburgh, 2-1 — one of 2 one-run finishes across the league.
